sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id Int32, event_time String, event_value Float64);
SELECT id, YYYYMMDDhhmmssToDateTime64(event_time, 'UTC', 3) AS parsed_time FROM test_dates WHERE YYYYMMDDhhmmssToDateTime64(event_time, 'UTC', 3) <= now();

CREATE TABLE event_summary AS SELECT id, count(*) as total_events, min(YYYYMMDDhhmmssToDateTime64(event_time, 'UTC', 3)) as first_event_time FROM test_dates WHERE event_value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY id HAVING total_events > 0;

SELECT id, COUNT(*) AS event_count, AVG(event_value) AS average_value FROM test_dates WHERE YYYYMMDDhhmmssToDateTime64(event_time, 'UTC', 3) <= now() AND event_value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY id HAVING event_count > 0 ORDER BY average_value DESC;

SELECT id, event_value, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_dates AS inner_table WHERE inner_table.event_value > external_table.event_value) AS rank FROM test_dates AS external_table WHERE YYYYMMDDhhmmssToDateTime64(event_time, 'UTC', 3) <= now();

CREATE TABLE test_joined AS SELECT a.id, a.event_value, YYYYMMDDhhmmssToDateTime64(a.event_time, 'UTC', 3) as parsed_time, b.total_events FROM test_dates AS a JOIN (SELECT id, COUNT(*) AS total_events FROM test_dates GROUP BY id) AS b ON a.id <= b.id;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_dates AS SELECT id, YYYYMMDDhhmmssToDateTime64(event_time, 'UTC', 3) AS precise_time FROM test_dates WHERE event_value IS NOT NULL;

SELECT temp.id, temp.precise_time, a.total_events FROM temp_dates AS temp JOIN (SELECT id, COUNT(*) AS total_events FROM test_dates GROUP BY id) AS a ON temp.precise_time <= now() ORDER BY temp.precise_time DESC;
